psychocall.name: Psycho Call
psychocall.shortDesc: Boosts Psychic moves in a pinch (1/3 HP or less). Acts like Blaze/Torrent/Overgrow but for Psychic type.
psychocall.desc: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its attacking Psychic-type moves are boosted by 1.5x.

spiritcall.name: Spirit Call
spiritcall.shortDesc: Boosts Ghost moves in a pinch (1/3 HP or less).
spiritcall.desc: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its attacking Ghost-type moves are boosted by 1.5x.

shadowcall.name: Shadow Call
shadowcall.shortDesc: Boosts Dark moves in a pinch (1/3 HP or less).
shadowcall.desc: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its attacking Dark-type moves are boosted by 1.5x.

windforce.name: Wind Force
windforce.shortDesc: Flying-type attacks do 1.3x damage when hit by wind moves.
windforce.desc: This Pokémon's Flying-type attacks deal 1.3x damage.

noctem.name: Noctem
noctem.shortDesc: Sets New Moon weather on switch-in, boosting Dark-type moves.
noctem.desc: On switch-in, this Pokémon summons New Moon for 5 turns, boosting Dark-type moves by 1.5x and weakening Fairy-type moves.

shadowdance.name: Shadow Dance
shadowdance.shortDesc: Speed is doubled in New Moon.
shadowdance.desc: If New Moon is active, this Pokémon's Speed is doubled.

hubris.name: Hubris
hubris.shortDesc: Special Attack rises by 1 stage when this Pokémon KOs another.
hubris.desc: This Pokémon's Special Attack is raised by 1 stage when it knocks out another Pokémon.

shadowsynergy.name: Shadow Synergy
shadowsynergy.shortDesc: Shadow Mewtwo Mega ability. Dark and Psychic moves gain 1.3x power.
shadowsynergy.desc: This Pokémon's Dark-type and Psychic-type moves deal 1.3x damage.

proteanmaxima.name: Protean Maxima
proteanmaxima.shortDesc: Changes to the type of every move used, and each move gets STAB.
proteanmaxima.desc: Before using a move, this Pokémon's type changes to match that move. Every attack gets STAB.

unleafed.name: Unleafed
unleafed.shortDesc: Grass-type moves heal 1/4 HP instead of dealing damage to this Pokémon.
unleafed.desc: This Pokémon is healed by 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Grass-type moves.

spectraljaws.name: Spectral Jaws
spectraljaws.shortDesc: Biting moves deal Ghost-type damage in addition to normal damage.
spectraljaws.desc: This Pokémon's biting moves also deal Ghost-type damage.

foundry.name: Foundry
foundry.desc: This Pokémon's Rock-type moves become Fire-type and gain 1.2x power.

vaporization.name: Vaporization
vaporization.shortDesc: Water-type moves used against this Pokémon evaporate and heal it.
vaporization.desc: This Pokémon is immune to Water-type moves and heals 1/4 HP when hit by them.

irrelephant.name: Irrelephant
irrelephant.desc: This Pokémon's moves can hit regardless of type-based immunities.

pendulum.name: Pendulum
pendulum.shortDesc: Using the same move consecutively increases power by 1.2x each time.
pendulum.desc: This Pokémon's moves increase in power by 1.2x each consecutive use (max 2x).

amplifier.name: Amplifier
amplifier.desc: This Pokémon's sound-based moves deal 1.3x damage.

prismguard.name: Prism Guard
prismguard.shortDesc: Reflects 1/4 of damage taken from special attacks.
prismguard.desc: When this Pokémon is hit by a special attack, the attacker loses 1/4 of the damage dealt.

periodicorbit.name: Periodic Orbit
periodicorbit.shortDesc: Jirachi Mega ability. Type changes each turn cycling through all types.
periodicorbit.desc: At the end of each turn, this Pokémon's type changes to the next type in the type cycle.

etherealshroud.name: Ethereal Shroud
etherealshroud.shortDesc: Normal and Fighting moves pass through this Pokémon.
etherealshroud.desc: This Pokémon is immune to Normal-type and Fighting-type moves.

speedswap.name: Speed Swap
speedswap.shortDesc: On entry, swaps Speed stat with the opponent.
speedswap.desc: On switch-in, this Pokémon swaps its Speed stat with the opposing Pokémon.

sleet.name: Sleet
sleet.shortDesc: Sets hail on switch-in. Ice-type moves boosted 1.3x in hail.
sleet.desc: On switch-in, this Pokémon summons hail that lasts 5 turns. Its Ice-type moves deal 1.3x damage in hail.

lernean.name: Lernean
lernean.shortDesc: Multi-hit moves always hit the maximum number of times.
lernean.desc: This Pokémon's multi-hit moves always hit the maximum number of times.

athenian.name: Athenian
athenian.shortDesc: Uses Special Attack for physical moves.
athenian.desc: This Pokémon's physical moves use its Special Attack stat instead of Attack.

venomous.name: Venomous
venomous.desc: This Pokémon's contact moves have a 30% chance to poison the target.

chlorofury.name: Chlorofury
chlorofury.shortDesc: In Sun, Sp.Atk is boosted 1.5x and Fire moves gain STAB.
chlorofury.desc: In Sun, this Pokémon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5 and its Fire-type moves receive STAB.

supercell.name: Supercell
supercell.shortDesc: Electric and Steel moves boosted 1.3x in Rain or Electric Terrain.
supercell.desc: In Rain or Electric Terrain, this Pokémon's Electric and Steel moves deal 1.3x damage.

absolution.name: Absolution
absolution.shortDesc: Ghost moves boosted 1.3x in New Moon.
absolution.desc: In New Moon, this Pokémon's Ghost-type moves deal 1.3x damage.

icecleats.name: Ice Cleats
icecleats.shortDesc: Speed doubled on Ice or in Hail.
icecleats.desc: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during hail or when on icy terrain.
